columns.name: provider_id
columns.description: The CMS Certification Number (CCN) of the provider billing for outpatient hospital services

columns.name: provider_name
columns.description: The name of the provider

columns.name: provider_street_address
columns.description: The street address in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: provider_city
columns.description: The city in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: provider_state
columns.description: The state in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: provider_zipcode
columns.description: The zip code in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: drg_definition
columns.description: The code and description identifying the MS-DRG. MS-DRGs are a classification system that groups similar clinical conditions (diagnoses) and the procedures furnished by the hospital during the stay

columns.name: hospital_referral_region_description
columns.description: The Hospital Referral Region (HRR) in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: total_discharges
columns.description: The number of discharges billed by the provider for inpatient hospital services

columns.name: average_covered_charges
columns.description: The provider's average charge for services covered by Medicare for all discharges in the MS-DRG. These will vary from hospital to hospital because of differences in hospital charge structures

columns.name: average_total_payments
columns.description: The average total payments to all providers for the MS-DRG including the MSDRG amount, teaching, disproportionate share, capital, and outlier payments for all cases. Also included 5 in average total payments are co-payment and deductible amounts that the patient is responsible for and any additional payments by third parties for coordination of benefits

columns.name: average_medicare_payments
columns.description: The average amount that Medicare pays to the provider for Medicare's share of the MS-DRG. Average Medicare payment amounts include the MS-DRG amount, teaching, disproportionate share, capital, and outlier payments for all cases. Medicare payments DO NOT include beneficiary co-payments and deductible amounts nor any additional payments from third parties for coordination of benefits

columns.name: provider_id
columns.description: The CMS Certification Number (CCN) of the provider billing for outpatient hospital services

columns.name: provider_name
columns.description: The name of the provider

columns.name: provider_street_address
columns.description: The street address in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: provider_city
columns.description: The city in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: provider_state
columns.description: The state in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: provider_zipcode
columns.description: The zip code in which the provider is physically located

columns.name: apc
columns.description: The code and description identifying the MS-DRG. MS-DRGs are a classification system that groups similar clinical conditions (diagnoses) and the procedures furnished by the hospital during the stay

columns.name: hospital_referral_region
columns.description: Code and description identifying the APC. APCs are a classification system where individual services (Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System [HCPCS] codes) are assigned based on similar clinical characteristics and similar costs

columns.name: outpatient_services
columns.description: The number of discharges billed by the provider for inpatient hospital services

columns.name: average_estimated_submitted_charges
columns.description: The number of services billed by the provider for outpatient hospital services

columns.name: average_total_payments
columns.description: The provider's average estimated submitted charge for services covered by Medicare for the APC. These will vary from hospital to hospital because of differences in hospital charge structures
